summary: P0 Date Bug Fix Verified - All tests pass. The date normalization fix correctly handles malformed years (0026 -> 2026). Backend tests: 29/29 pass. Frontend booking flow: 100% working. Stripe checkout integration operational.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 date normalization bug FIXED and VERIFIED. The bug was: browser date picker could produce years like '0026' when user typed '26'. Fix: (1) Frontend DatePicker normalizes dates via normalizeDate() function (lines 562-582 in GuestChat.jsx), (2) Backend normalize_date_string() function converts malformed years (lines 189-207 in booking.py). Tests cover: normal dates, 0026->2026, 026->2026, 26->2026, 0001 rejection, far future rejection. Full booking flow verified: dates -> guests -> rooms -> services -> summary -> payment button.

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: Dates were malformed (0026 instead of 2026) causing availability check to fail
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Browser date picker behavior when user types '26' can result in year '0026'
